title: More of Yearn: Enchants & Crafts
description: To provide you with more Echantments and Recipes
body:
# This MOD has added some enchantments and recipes to make your Minecraft richer and simpler
## Enchantments
### *Logically speaking, all enchantments feature full compatibility with [Universal Enchants](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-enchants). Many enchantments, however, are clearly designed for specific weapons only.
- **Illagers Bane**
> Deals extra damage to illagers and witches.
- **Wane and Wax**
> Inflicts Wither and grants the Strength effect on attack.
- **Levitation Stab**
> **Trident** strikes inflict Levitation.
- **Heavy Wounds**
> **Heavy weapon** attacks inflict Weakness and Slowness.
- **Steadfast**
> Increases knockback resistance for **chest plates**.
- **Lightweight**
> Increases attack speed of **heavy weapons**.
- **Long Sword**
> Increases **sword** attack reach.
- **Reach**
> Increases block reach distance
- **Vitality**
> Increases maximum health
- **Toughness**
> Increases armor toughness
- **Dimensional Traveler**
> Provides different effects in different dimensions
- **Magic Resistance** ~~_(Unavailable on Forge)_~~**Available on Forge since version 1.7.1**
> Immunity to Magic Damage
- **Swift Pounce**
> Boosts Pet's Speed and Attack
- **Slicing**
> Increases sword's cobweb destruction speed
- **Bulwark**
> Grants the shield additional armor
## Recipes
